# Test fixtures

- `sample.heic` — small (7 KB) HEVC-coded HEIC image (`ftyp` brand `heic`),
  the format Samsung and iPhone cameras produce. Sourced from the libheif
  test suite (`tests/data/rainbow-451x461.heic`,
  https://github.com/strukturag/libheif). Synthetic rainbow gradient,
  451×461 px — no real-photo content, no patient data.
